lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: Hello, my friend. Would you like me to show you the prices of logs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You look like you've travelled a fair distance.

lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: What gave me away?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't mean to be rude, but the clothing and hair, for starters.

lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: Ah, yes. I'm from Shilo Village on Karamja, it's a style I've had since I was little.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then tell me, why are you so far from home?

lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: This Grand Exchange! Isn't it marvellous! I've never seen anything like it in my life.

lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: My people were saddened when I chose to leave home and travel here, but I hope to make some serious profit, then return to my tribe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what are you selling?

lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: Logs! Of all kinds! That's my plan, at least. Living in the jungle as we do, my people understand exotic wood very well indeed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, show me the prices of logs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I need to be making tracks.

lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: Okay, nice talking to you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, show me the prices of logs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I need to be making tracks.

lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: Okay, nice talking to you!

lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: Just one more offer! One more!

lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: Such a joy it is to be in this building.

lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: Yes! Yet another great deal.

lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: My people shall be so proud!

lines.speaker: Relobo Blinyo (logs)
lines.text: Hmmm. These numbers don't quite add up.
